description_long: This house features a rectangular layout with a mix of brick and stone textures on its exterior walls, giving it a robust and traditional appearance. The property includes a detached garage, a fenced yard, and a landscaped garden area with several large trees and shrubs. The main building has two stories, with a flat roof and a rooftop terrace partially enclosed by a low wall. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a combination of small and large panes, and the main entrance is marked by a prominent arched doorway and a short set of steps. Outdoor amenities include a hot tub, patio furniture, and decorative planters, enhancing the residential comfort. The overall design blends Mediterranean and contemporary influences, with clean lines and earthy tones.
description: A two-story brick and stone house with a flat roof, detached garage, fenced yard, and landscaped garden featuring large trees and a hot tub. The design combines Mediterranean and contemporary elements with asymmetrical windows and a prominent arched entryway.
description_view_0: This view highlights the side of the house with the detached garage, a fenced yard, and visible planters near the main building.
description_view_1: This angle showcases the backyard area, including the hot tub, patio furniture, and a row of tall shrubs along the house wall.
description_view_2: From this perspective, the garage and the rear of the house are prominent, with large trees providing shade and privacy.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the front of the house, featuring the arched main entryway, front fence, and rooftop terrace.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main doorway with short steps, decorative fencing, and a small porch area
